content.json:
# 📡 fwlog — Campaign Pipeline Monitor
Monitor ingestion → transformation → kafka pipeline performance and state.

parameters.name: CmpgnCd
parameters.label: Campaign
parameters.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| extend v = tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"])
| where isnotempty(v)
| summarize by v
| sort by v asc
| project value = v, label = v

content.query:
let sla = datatable(step:string, warn_min:real, crit_min:real)
[
    "ingestion",       20, 30,
    "transformation",  30, 45,
    "kafka",           60, 90
];
dependencies
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend dur_min = duration / 60000.0
| summarize
    runs    = count(),
    avg_min = round(avg(dur_min), 1),
    p50_min = round(percentile(dur_min, 50), 1),
    p75_min = round(percentile(dur_min, 75), 1),
    p95_min = round(percentile(dur_min, 95), 1),
    max_min = round(max(dur_min), 1)
    by step = name
| join kind=leftouter sla on step
| extend recommendation = case(
    p95_min > crit_min, "🔴 Investigate",
    p95_min > warn_min, "🟡 Monitor",
    "🟢 Normal")
| project step, runs, avg_min, p50_min, p75_min, p95_min, max_min, recommendation
| order by p95_min desc
content.title: Process Duration Percentiles (P50 / P75 / P95 / Max) + Recommendation

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend pos_dt  = todatetime(customDimensions["pos_dt"])
| extend dur_min = duration / 60000.0
| summarize p95_min = round(percentile(dur_min, 95), 1)
    by pos_dt, step = name
| order by pos_dt asc
content.title: P95 Duration Trend per Step (minutes)

content.query:
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(30d)
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend pos_dt  = todatetime(customDimensions["pos_dt"])
| extend dur_min = duration / 60000.0
| summarize avg_min = round(avg(dur_min), 1)
    by pos_dt, step = name
| order by pos_dt asc
content.title: Avg Duration Trend per Step (minutes)

content.query:
dependencies
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend dur_min  = round(duration / 60000.0, 1)
| extend cmpgn_cd = tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"])
| project timestamp, step = name, cmpgn_cd, dur_min, operation_Id
| top 20 by dur_min desc
content.title: Slowest 20 Individual Runs

content.query:
dependencies
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend cmpgn_cd = tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"])
| extend dur_min  = duration / 60000.0
| summarize
    ingestion      = sumif(dur_min, name == "ingestion"),
    transformation = sumif(dur_min, name == "transformation"),
    kafka          = sumif(dur_min, name == "kafka"),
    first_seen     = min(timestamp)
    by cmpgn_cd
| project cmpgn_cd,
          ingestion      = round(ingestion, 1),
          transformation = round(transformation, 1),
          kafka          = round(kafka, 1),
          timestamp      = first_seen
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: Pipeline Duration per Campaign (minutes, summed)

content.query:
dependencies
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend cmpgn_cd   = tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"])
| extend count_lead = toint(customDimensions["count_lead"])
| summarize
    ingestion      = sumif(count_lead, name == "ingestion"),
    transformation = sumif(count_lead, name == "transformation"),
    kafka          = sumif(count_lead, name == "kafka"),
    total          = sum(count_lead),
    first_seen     = min(timestamp)
    by cmpgn_cd
| project cmpgn_cd, ingestion, transformation, kafka, total,
          timestamp = first_seen
| order by timestamp desc
content.title: count_lead per Step per Campaign

content.query:
dependencies
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend cmpgn_cd   = tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"])
| extend count_lead = toint(customDimensions["count_lead"])
| extend pos_dt     = tostring(customDimensions["pos_dt"])
| summarize total_lead = sum(count_lead) by pos_dt, step = name
| order by pos_dt asc, step asc
content.title: Lead Volume per Step per Day

content.query:
let thresholds = datatable(step:string, max_min:real)
[
    "ingestion",       30,
    "transformation",  45,
    "kafka",           90
];
dependencies
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend step       = name
| extend actual_min = duration / 60000.0
| join kind=inner thresholds on step
| where actual_min > max_min
| project timestamp, cmpgn_cd = operation_Name, step,
          actual_min = round(actual_min,1), max_min,
          source_file = tostring(customDimensions["source_file"])
| order by actual_min desc
content.title: SLA Threshold Breaches

content.query:
let expected_steps = dynamic(["ingestion","transformation","kafka"]);
dependencies
| where name in ("ingestion","transformation","kafka")
| where "value::all" in ({CmpgnCd}) or tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"]) in ({CmpgnCd})
| extend cmpgn_cd = tostring(customDimensions["cmpgn_cd"])
| summarize completed_steps = make_set(name) by cmpgn_cd
| extend missing_steps = set_difference(expected_steps, completed_steps)
| where array_length(missing_steps) > 0
| project cmpgn_cd, completed_steps, missing_steps
| order by cmpgn_cd asc
content.title: Campaigns with Missing Pipeline Steps
